overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a desert badlands environment at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves from rocky terrain onto a paved road lined with utility poles and street lights, walking steadily toward distant illuminated structures on the horizon before turning off into the desert.

events.description: camera moves from rocky hillside terrain onto the paved road shoulder
street lamp illumination becomes visible on the road surface ahead

agents.ego_description: walking from rocky desert terrain down onto the paved roadside, approaching the road

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop and hillside dominating the right side of the frame
single lane asphalt road with yellow dividing line
wooden utility pole with transformers and overhead power lines
concrete paved shoulder alongside the road
glowing lights from distant buildings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a rocky desert environment with sparse scrub vegetation. The camera moves forward from the rocks toward a paved road, transitioning onto the concrete roadside. Utility poles with overhead lines become prominent, and distant city lights glow on the horizon under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway roadside with utility poles

events.description: steady walking pace continues, passing the first utility pole and approaching the next
palm trees and desert vegetation become visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete roadside, passing utility poles and street lights while approaching the distant city

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera walks steadily along the concrete roadside parallel to the asphalt road, passing utility poles with street lights that cast pools of light on the pavement. The rocky hills fall behind as the desert opens up, with palm trees visible on the right and the distant city glow growing slightly larger ahead.

events.description: camera turns right and leaves the paved road, moving onto desert terrain
transition from roadside walking to off-road desert exploration

agents.ego_description: turning right off the road and walking into the desert toward distant illuminated structures

entered.detail: sandy desert ground with sparse vegetation and small rocks
buildings with red and white lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right away from the road and walks onto the desert terrain. The asphalt road and utility poles fall behind to the left as the camera moves toward distant structures with glowing lights. The ground changes from concrete to sandy desert soil with scattered vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rugged desert wilderness onto a lit roadside before veering back into the dark badlands. It begins amidst rocky terrain and sparse scrub, moving forward until the ground transitions from natural stone to a concrete roadside lined with utility poles and overhead lines. As the camera walks steadily along the asphalt, the rocky hills recede and the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and a growing city glow on the horizon, with street lights casting rhythmic pools of light across the pavement. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, leaving the road and utility poles behind to traverse sandy desert soil and scattered vegetation. Finally, the movement carries the viewer away from the infrastructure and deeper into the night toward distant, glowing structures.
